summary: K-Factor Engine (Viral Scaling Phase) Testing Complete. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all K-Factor features on share page (/v/slug): (1) Social proof banner with 'X people continued this story - Be the next to decide what happens' text, (2) Urgency badge 'Trending now' appears after 4 seconds, (3) 'Continue This Story' CTA with 'No signup needed to start' text, (4) Share & Earn Credits section with +5/+15/+25 reward tiers displayed, (5) 4 share buttons: WhatsApp, X, Instagram, Copy Link, (6) Mid-page hook 'This story has no ending...' with Continue button, (7) Story hook section with 'Where the story left off...' cliffhanger text, (8) Secondary CTAs: Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, (9) Remix Variants section (Comic Book, GIF, Reel, Bedtime), (10) Momentum section with continuation count. Dashboard verified: Return banner shows 'Your story isn't over' with cliffhanger, Streak display shows emotional messaging.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicCreation.js correctly implements social proof banner at line 249 with data-testid='social-proof-banner'
Urgency badge appears after 4 seconds via useEffect timer at lines 47-50, with data-testid='urgency-badge'
Share & Earn section at lines 389-407 displays +5/+15/+25 reward tiers with 4 share buttons (WA/X/IG/Copy)
Mid-page hook 'This story has no ending...' at lines 344-355 with data-testid='no-ending-hook'
Story hook section at lines 329-341 with 'Where the story left off...' cliffhanger text
Secondary CTAs (Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode) at lines 410-423 with proper data-testid attributes
Remix variants section at lines 457-493 with Comic Book, GIF, Reel, Bedtime options
Momentum section at lines 439-454 shows continuation count and story metadata
StoryVideoPipeline.js PostGenPhase has viral-loop-share section at lines 1384-1434 with +5/+15/+25 reward tiers
growth_analytics.py continuation_reward upgraded to +15 credits at line 384
growth_analytics.py signup-referral-reward endpoint awards +25 credits at line 450
growth_analytics.py k-factor endpoint returns user and platform_7d metrics at lines 481-530
context_for_next_testing_agent: K-Factor Engine (Viral Scaling Phase) verified: (1) Share page (/v/slug) has social proof banner with continuation count + 'Be the next to decide what happens' text. (2) Urgency badge 'Trending now' appears after 4 seconds via setTimeout. (3) Continue This Story CTA with 'No signup needed to start' text. (4) Share & Earn Credits section displays +5 share / +15 friend continues / +25 friend signs up reward tiers. (5) 4 share buttons: WhatsApp (WA), X, Instagram (IG), Copy Link. (6) Mid-page hook 'This story has no ending...' with Continue It Yourself button. (7) Story hook section shows 'Where the story left off...' with cliffhanger text. (8) Secondary CTAs: Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode buttons. (9) Remix Variants: Comic Book, GIF, Reel, Bedtime. (10) Momentum section shows continuation count. (11) PostGenPhase in StoryVideoPipeline.js has viral-loop-share section with same +5/+15/+25 reward tiers. (12) Backend APIs: GET /api/growth/k-factor returns user metrics (total_shares, total_continuations_earned, total_referral_signups, credits_from_virality) and platform_7d metrics (total_shares, share_to_continue, share_to_signup, estimated_k_factor). POST /api/growth/continuation-reward awards +15 credits. POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward awards +25 credits. (13) Dashboard: Return banner shows 'Your story isn't over' with cliffhanger. Streak display shows emotional messaging. (14) All Phase 4/4.5 features still working: streak API, return-banner API, rankings API.
